blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or focus issues.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image ensuring the camera is steady and the document is in focus.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure proper lighting and avoid shadows when capturing the image.

glare_identification.description: No glare or overexposed regions are detected in the image.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration are present in the image.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, folds, or creases are detected in the image.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the document's edges are slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete content are detected in the image.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as fingers, shadows, or objects are present in the image.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, taxInformation, paymentMethod, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The document is a detailed invoice from Orange Belgium for telecommunications services.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields for expense identification were found in the document.

extraction.terms_conditions: Contrat à durée indéterminée. Ce contrat peut être résilié sans frais à tout moment et par tout moyen écrit.

issues.description: The date of the transaction is not clearly visible on the receipt. The receipt only shows the invoice date, not the date of the transaction.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Date of the expense must be clearly visible on the receipt. Invoices must include the date on which the expenditure was made

issues.description: The expense type description is not clearly visible on the receipt. The receipt only shows the subscription number and amount, not a clear description of the expense type.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Expense type or description of goods/services purchased must be shown on the receipt

issues.description: The purchaser details are not in the name of GoGlobal Europe GmbH as required. The receipt shows the customer name as Mr. PASCAL CAISSE.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Invoice in the name of the employee or GoGlobal Europe GmbH, Prielmayerstr. 3 80335 Munich Allemagne. Invoices must use GoGlobal's details: GoGlobal Europe GmbH, Prielmayerstr. 3, 80335 Munich, Allemagne

issues.description: Additional documentation is required to establish the business purpose of the expense and obtain line manager approval.
issues.recommendation: Please provide itemized expense reports and obtain line manager approval before the payroll cutoff date.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Business purpose must be established and clearly documented for all expenses. Employee's line manager approval required before payroll cutoff date.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing transaction date, unclear expense type description, incorrect purchaser details, and missing additional documentation. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with the specified standards and policies.
